title: Patient satisfaction survey at the multidisciplinary knee osteoarthritis clinic
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"63t70","text":"To evaluate the satisfaction of patients undergoing conservative multidisciplinary treatment for osteoarthritis of the knee at Hopstial Universitário Pedro Ernesto.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"dn5al","text":"This protocol will be used to research the satisfaction index of patients submitted to conservative multidisciplinary treatment of knee osteoarthritis in a university hospital. The entire interview will be conducted through the questionnaire and no risk or expense will be imposed on the packages. The research can guide possible improvements in the assistance service offered at the university.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"bgt7q","text":"The entire interview will be conducted with no risk or expense will be imposed. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"eon62","text":"We will interview all patients who underwent conservative multidisciplinary treatment for knee ostearthritis at Hospital Pedro Ernesto since the last quarter of 2020 and the first quarter of 2021.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: To survey de medical records of all patients who treated at the multidisciplinary knee osteoarthritis outpatient clinic at Hospital Universitário Pedro Ernesto.
Make contact and explain the content and importance of the research to improve the quality of assistance.
Conduct the interview with eight questions for patients who agree to participate.
creator: Rebeca Dias
